blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
